title: RDR's Soundtrack
description: Replaces the vanilla Minecraft soundtracks with the Red Dead Redemption games ones.
body: It basically replaces all the Minecraft soundtracks with the RDR's ones, including the Nether and End dimensions! For example, in the Overworld, the played songs are from the american side of both games worlds, while in the Nether, the played songs are from the mexican side.
